label: SYSTEM
command: if [ -r /etc/os-release ]; then . /etc/os-release; printf '%s\n' "${PRETTY_NAME:-${NAME:-Linux}}"; else uname -sr; fi

label: UPTIME
command: awk '{ s=int($1); d=int(s/86400); h=int((s%86400)/3600); m=int((s%3600)/60); if (d>0) printf "%dd %02dh %02dm\n",d,h,m; else printf "%02dh %02dm\n",h,m }' /proc/uptime

label: MEMORY
command: awk '/MemTotal:/{t=$2}/MemAvailable:/{a=$2} END { if (t>0) printf "%d%% used / %d MiB free\n", ((t-a)*100/t), (a/1024); else print "unavailable" }' /proc/meminfo

label: DISK /
command: df -P / | awk 'NR==2 { print $5 " used / " int($4/1024) " MiB free" }'

label: FAILED UNITS
command: if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then n=$(systemctl --failed --no-legend 2>/dev/null | awk 'END { print NR + 0 }'); printf '%s\n' "$n"; else printf 'systemd unavailable\n'; fi
